accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims present.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as reauthorizing and modifying DoD aircraft sales for wildfire suppression.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly names the Wildfire Suppression Aircraft Transfer Act of 1996 and describes the amendments.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the use restriction limiting equipment to wildfire suppression aircraft services.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states enactment date of June 12, 2025 and sunset of October 1, 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures reauthorization period, water inclusion, use restriction, and technical cross-reference updates.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and non-partisan.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the DoD, the 1996 Act, and Public Law 119-18.

correct_figures.why: The dates June 12, 2025 and October 1, 2035 match the bill text.
